fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Hawaii Physical Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a physical therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Hawaii - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: physical therapist license reciprocity hawaii, how to transfer physical therapist license to hawaii, physical therapist compact hawaii, hawaii physical therapist endorsement application

board.name: Hawaii DCCA — Physical Therapy
board.parent_dept: Hawaii Department of Health (DOH) Office of Health Care Assurance
board.mailing_address:
Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs
Professional and Vocational Licensing Division
P.O. Box 3469
Honolulu, HI 96801

quick_facts.renewal_cycle: Every 2 years (by December 31 of odd-numbered years)

license_types.title: PT, DPT
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a physical therapist in Hawaii.

steps.title: Create a MyPVL Account
steps.description: Navigate to https://myrli.cca.hawaii.gov/ and register for a MyPVL account by selecting 'Create a New Account' and completing the registration process.

steps.title: Submit Online Application & Pay Fees
steps.description: Log into your MyPVL account, select the Physical Therapist application type (either by examination or endorsement), fill out the required information, and pay the initial $100 application and compliance resolution fund fees.

steps.title: Request Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for all official transcripts from your accredited physical therapy program(s) to be sent directly from the institution to the Hawaii DCCA Professional & Vocational Licensing Division.

steps.title: Submit NPTE Scores or Verification
steps.description: For initial licensure by examination, arrange for the Federation of State Boards of Physical Therapy (FSBPT) to send your official National Physical Therapy Examination (NPTE) scores directly to the Hawaii DCCA. For licensure by endorsement, arrange for verification of current and past licenses to be sent from other states where you hold or have held a PT license.

steps.title: Complete Background Check
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided by the DCCA PVL upon application submission for completing a criminal background check, which typically includes fingerprinting.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination).

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NPTE. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Hawaii physical therapist license cost?
faqs.answer: For endorsement applicants, the state licensing fee is $100. Additional third-party costs (fingerprinting, transcripts, or verification) may apply.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination) is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Hawaii have reciprocity for physical therapists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers physical therapist practice in Hawaii. To work in Hawaii, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my physical therapist license to Hawaii?
faqs.answer: Current board processing time is 4 to 6 Weeks (after all documents received) once your file is complete.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Hawaii while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Physical Therapist in Hawaii
hero.dek: To apply for a Physical Therapist license in Hawaii, you must submit your application online through the MyPVL system.

official_links.registration_steps: Go to https://myrli.cca.hawaii.gov/, click 'Create a New Account', and follow the prompts to register your profile and create login credentials.
